Processes¶

class lca_modules.material.process.Process¶

Bases: Master

Process object, inheriting from the Master object, represent a process.

inputs¶

Input products and processes.

Type:

list of Master Obj.

classmethod copy(obj)¶

Make a copy of an object.

Returns:

Copy of the object.

Return type:

Master Obj.

get_datasets()¶

Get dataset objects of the Master Obj.

Returns:

Datasets corresponding to attributes: {attr (str): Dataset Obj}

Return type:

dict.

get_distributions()¶

Get distribution objects of the Master Obj.

Returns:

Distributions Datasets corresponding to attributes: {attr (str): Distribution Obj}.

Return type:

dict.

get_id()¶

Retrieve the identification number of the product/process.

Returns:

Identification number of the product/process.

Return type:

int

get_impact_database_entry()¶

Retrieve the impact database row corresponding to the product/process.

Returns:

Flow name corresponding to the database entry which gives the unit impact of the product.

Return type:

str

get_impacts()¶

Retrieve the impacts of the product/process.

Returns:

Impacts of the product/process.

Return type:

Impacts Obj.

get_life_cycle_stage()¶

Retrieve the life cycle stage corresponding to the product/process.

Returns:

Corresponding life cycle stage.

Return type:

str

get_model()¶

Retrieve the model corresponding to the product/process.

Returns:

Model corresponding to the product/process.

Return type:

Model Obj.

get_name()¶

Retrieve the name of the product/process.

Returns:

Name of the product/process.

Return type:

str

get_project()¶

Retrieve the corresponding project.

Returns:

Corresponding project.

Return type:

Project Obj.

get_qty()¶

Retrieve the quantity of the product/process.

Returns:

Quantity of the product/process.

Return type:

float

get_unit()¶

Retrieve the unit of measurement of the product/process.

Returns:

Unit of measurement of the product/process.

Return type:

str

classmethod new(id, name, model, stage, qty, unit, impacts_from)¶

Create a new item in a model.

Parameters:

  • id (int.) -- An identification number.

  • name (str) -- Name of the item.

  • model (Model Obj.) -- Model in which the item is created.

  • stage (str) -- LCA stage.

  • qty (float) -- Quantity of the item

  • unit (Unit Obj) -- Unit corresponding to the quantity.

  • impacts_from (str) -- Name of the impact database entry from which to use impacts.

set_dataset(dataset, attr)¶

Set a dataset object to the Master Obj.

Parameters:

  • dataset (Dataset Obj.) -- Dataset object to be set

  • attr (str.) -- Attribute to which the dataset correspond.

set_distribution(distribution, attr)¶

Set a set_distribution object to the Master Obj.

Parameters:

  • distribution (Distribution Obj.) -- Distribution object to be set

  • attr (str.) -- Attribute to which the distribution correspond.

set_id(id: int)¶

Set the product/process id.

Parameters:

id (float) -- Item identification number.

set_impact_database_entry(database_item: str)¶

Sets the database (impacts) entry corresponding to the item. This method will also update the corresponding impact quanitities.

Parameters:

database_item (str.) -- The name of the database item which gives the item impacts.

set_life_cycle_stage(stage)¶

Set life cycle stage of the product/process.

Parameters:

stage (str) -- Life cycle stage of the product/process.

set_model(model)¶

Set the model corresponding to the product/process.

Parameters:

model (Model Obj.) -- Model corresponding to the product/process.

set_name(name)¶

Set name of the product/process.

Parameters:

name (str) -- Name of the product/process.

set_qty(qty: float)¶

Update the qty of the item. This will also re-calculate the corresponding impact quantities.

Parameters:

qty (float) -- Production quantity.

set_unit(unit)¶

Set unit of measurement for the product/process.

Parameters:

unit (Unit Obj.) -- Unit of measurement.

update_impacts()¶

Sets impacts quantities, based on database item asigned to the product/process and the product/process quantity. If no database entry is asigned, impacts are not updated.

:raises ImportError : Incompatible units of Master object and database entry.:

class lca_modules.material.process.transportationProcess¶

Bases: Process

Transportation Process object, inheriting from the Process object, represent a transportation process.

transported_distance¶

Distance traveled in the transportation process.

Type:

float

transported_weight¶

Mass transported in the transportation process.

Type:

float

transported_distance_unit¶

Unit of measurement of the distance travelled.

Type:

Unit Obj.

transported_weight_unit¶

Unit of measurement of the transported mass.

Type:

Unit Obj.

transported_products¶

Products transported in the transportation process.

Type:

list of Product Obj.

get_transported_distance()¶

Retrieve the distance travelled in the transportation process.

Returns:

Distance traveled in the transportation process.

Return type:

float

get_transported_distance_unit()¶

Retrieve the unit of measurement of the travel distance of the transportation process.

Returns:

Unit of measurement of the distance travelled.

Return type:

str

get_transported_products()¶

Retrieve all products transported in the transportation process.

Returns:

All transported products.

Return type:

list of Product Obj.

get_transported_weight()¶

Retrieve the mass transported in the transportation process.

Returns:

Weight transported in the transportation process.

Return type:

float

get_transported_weight_unit()¶

Retrieve the unit of measurement of the transported mass of the transportation process.

Returns:

Unit of measurement of the transported mass.

Return type:

str

classmethod new(id, name, model, stage, transported_distance, unit, impacts_from)¶

Create process in a model.

Parameters:

  • id (int.) -- An identification number.

  • name (str) -- Name of the item.

  • model (Model Obj.) -- Model in which the item is created.

  • stage (str) -- LCA stage.

  • qty (float) -- Quantity of the item

  • unit (Unit Obj) -- Unit corresponding to the quantity.

  • impacts_from (str) -- Name of the impact database entry from which to use impacts.

remove_transported_product(item)¶

Remove a product from the transportation process. This will remove the transporter from the product as well. Transported mass of the transportation process is also updated.

Parameters:

item (Product Obj.) -- Product to be removed from the transportation process.

:raises Key Error : Product is not part of the transportation process.:

set_transported_distance(qty)¶

Update the distance travelled in the transportation process. This will update the process quantity of transportation (in mass x distance).

Parameters:

qty (float) -- Distance traveled in the transportation process.

set_transported_distance_unit(unit)¶

Set unit of measurement for travel distance of the transportation process. This will also update the process quantity of transportation (in mass x distance).

Parameters:

unit (str) -- Unit of measurement.

set_transported_product(product)¶

Set prodcuts transported in the transportation process. If there are no products currently tranported in this process, the unit of measurement of mass of the transportation process will be set to that of the product added. If not already added, will set the transportation process to the product as its transporter.

Note

This method is equivalent to calling 'set_transporter' from the Product Object.

Parameters:

product (Product Obj.) -- Product transported in the transportation process.

set_transported_products(products)¶

Set prodcuts transported in the transportation process. Will add each product in turn calling 'set_transported_product'.

Parameters:

products (list of Product Obj.) -- Products transported in the transportation process.

set_transported_weight()¶

Update the mass transported in the transportation process. This wil obtain the mass from corresponding products transported. The units of mass need not be consistent as the method converts units. This will also update the process quantity of transportation (in mass x distance).

set_transported_weight_unit(unit)¶

Set unit of measurement for mass transported. This will also update the process quantity of transportation (in mass x distance).

Parameters:

unit (str) -- Unit of measurement.

set_unit()¶

Set unit of measurement for the transportation process. The unit of measurement has dimensions of mass x distance.
